summary: Comprehensive testing of social features - User Search, Messaging, User Profiles, and Thread Replies. All backend APIs (14/14) passed. All frontend features working correctly.

backend_api_tests: User search by username 'liver' returns Liver97
Empty search query returns empty results
Get user profile for Liver97 returns complete profile data
Start conversation with user creates/returns conversation ID
Get conversation messages returns messages array
Get threads list returns threads array
Get user followers returns followers list
Get user following returns following list
Get thread replies returns replies with replying_to field
frontend_ui_tests: Login flow works - Start Now -> Login form -> Submit
Threads page loads and displays threads from Liver_97
Show replies button expands replies with 'رداً على @username' (replying to) visible
Messages page loads showing conversations list
Search modal opens from Messages page
Search for 'liver' shows Liver97 user with message button
User profile page (/user/{userId}) loads showing follow/unfollow and message buttons
Bottom navigation (Home, Threads, Messages, Profile, Settings) working

critical_code_review_comments: Reply indicator 'رداً على @username' properly shows in thread replies
User search with follow status and message button working
User profile page correctly handles API response format
Messaging system with conversations list and chat view functional
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users. Conversation with Liver97 created/reused during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social features (User Search, Messaging, User Profiles, Thread Replies) all working. Test credentials work. Liver97 user exists for search/profile testing. Routes /messages, /messages/:conversationId, /user/:userId all functional. Thread replies show 'رداً على @username' indicator correctly.
